guide: Edit Contact page content here, in the same order it appears on the public Contact page.

hero.label: Contact
hero.headline: Request a product quote.
hero.description: Share the product, quantity, destination, and timeline. MERABA will review the requirement and help evaluate the appropriate supply option.

formIntro.label: B2B PRODUCT INQUIRY
formIntro.title: Looking for a reliable product supplier?
formIntro.text: Share the product, quantity, destination, and timeline. We will review the requirement and help evaluate the right supply option.
formIntro.reviewText: Share the product, estimated quantity, destination, and timeline, and we’ll help review the right supply option.

successMessage.title: Thank you. Your request has been received.
successMessage.text: Our team will review your inquiry and get back to you shortly.

formFields.name: product
formFields.label: Product needed
formFields.placeholder: Example: CPET tray, portion cup, cutlery kit, custom packaging

messageField.label: Message / Specification
messageField.placeholder: Share specifications, packaging format, recurring supply needs, documentation, or other relevant details.
